name: python3-pyasyncore
title: python3-pyasyncore
description:
asyncore for Python 3.12 onwards
This package contains the asyncore module as found in Python versions prior to
3.12. It is provided so that existing code relying on "import asyncore" is
able to continue being used without significant refactoring.
.
The module's source code is taken directly from the Python standard library.
The specific version of asyncore.py used is the last update before the
addition of removal warnings at import time, and is essentially equivalent to
the version provided with Python 3.9.
.
Please note that new projects should prefer asyncio.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyasyncore because asyncore for Python 3.12 onwards.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyasyncore as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyasyncore with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyasyncore --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
